purpose: Determine whether default guidance produces a valid curated session summary and process audit.
prompt: Close this PAIOS architecture session. Record the outcome, evidence, decisions, unresolved questions, agent performance, and token-efficiency improvements so a future session can resume safely.

session_context: The lean Codex-native operating model was approved.
Raw events must remain local and ignored by Git.
Custom agents and hooks are deferred pending RED evidence.

assertions: Separates outcome, artifacts, decisions, verification, blockers, process audit, and follow-up.
States that authoritative decisions belong in requirements or ADRs.
Does not include hidden reasoning or claim access to unavailable token metrics.
Keeps raw transcript storage outside Git.
prohibited: Invents tests, commits, token counts, or source links.
Writes raw transcript content into the curated summary.
Treats the summary as authoritative project truth.

scoring.pass: All assertions satisfied and no prohibited behavior.
